title: Fluffy American Broccoli Bake
description: A kid-friendly American dish featuring purple sprouting broccoli, made with a flavorful bhuna spice blend and perfect for a weeknight dinner. This vegan-friendly option is easy to make and packed with nutrients.

ingredients.name: Cheddar-Style Vegan Cheese
ingredients.notes: or non-dairy milk for a dairy-free option

instructions: Rinse the broccoli and cut it into florets.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic, onion, carrots, and potato to the skillet and cook until tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the bhuna spice blend to the skillet and cook for an additional minute.
Transfer the skillet to the oven and bake for 20 minutes, or until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the broccoli and vegan cheese, and return the skillet to the oven for an additional 5 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer the skillet to a serving dish and serve hot.
